tool_args.raw_text: By September 2017, the full transition to an Open Road Tolling (ORT) environment was complete.

payload.description: Elimination of toll booths at all TBTA facilities and transition to Open Road Tolling

tool_args.label: July 2023 Total Paid Traffic
tool_args.raw_text: B&T's total paid traffic for July was 29.3 million, an increase of 2.1% compared to 28.7 million crossings in July 2022.

tool_args.label: July 2023 E-ZPass Market Share
tool_args.raw_text: E-ZPass market share was 92.4% in July

tool_args.label: August 2023 Total Paid Traffic
tool_args.raw_text: B&T's total paid traffic for August was 29.7 million, an increase of 1.8% compared to 29.2 million crossings in August 2022.

tool_args.label: August 2023 E-ZPass Market Share
tool_args.raw_text: E-ZPass market share was 92.4% in August

tool_args.label: September 2023 Toll Revenue Total
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue for September 2023: 27.8M traffic, $210.8M revenue

tool_args.label: Year-to-Date September 2023 Toll Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: YTD September 2023: Total traffic 250.8M, revenue $1,822.9M

tool_args.label: 2022 Estimated Toll Evasion
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, an estimated $46 million was attributed to toll evasion.

tool_args.label: Toll Recovery Since Open Road Tolling
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA has recovered over $77 million -- or 93.6% -- of all tolls owed by toll evaders since we converted to Open Road Tolling.

payload.scope: TBTA facilities since Open Road Tolling conversion (completed September 2017)
